hypothesis: If a diffusion model trained only on metastable-state MD data, guided by SBI-based interpolated conditional scores during the reverse SDE and refined by SAA along an approximate reaction coordinate, can sample transition-state configurations and produce committor-like distributions that closely match true transition states, then the ASTRA workflow validates that transition-state sampling is possible without explicit transition-state data and outperforms linear and geodesic interpolation baselines.
